title: Salty Crumbly Syrian Beef Salad
description: A refreshing light salad featuring crisp greens, tangy beet cubes, and crumbled lean minced steak, finished with a zesty sumac‑lemon dressing.
instructions: Season the minced steak with salt and sumac, mixing thoroughly.
Heat a non‑stick skillet over medium heat and cook the steak, breaking it into bite‑sized crumbles until just browned and a safe internal temperature of 145°F (63°C) is reached, about 5–6 minutes.
Remove the steak from the pan and set aside to cool slightly.
In a large bowl, combine the mixed greens, beet cubes, chickpeas, and olives.
Whisk lemon juice and olive oil together with a pinch of salt to create a simple dressing.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently to coat.
Add the warm crumbled steak to the salad and give one final toss.
Serve immediately, optionally garnishing with extra sumac or a few extra olives.
